zh.Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, B: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆波斯姆斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Ann Richards於1623年出生在英國英格蘭倫敦維斯特明斯特時，她的父親Gilbert Richards47歲，母親Barbara Walter25歲。她於1647年8月4日與Richard Carter在英國英格蘭倫敦維斯特明斯特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1670年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆波斯姆斯享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Ann Richards于1623年出生在英国英格兰倫敦維斯特明斯特时，她的父亲Gilbert Richards47岁，母亲Barbara Walter25岁。她于1647年8月4日与Richard Carter在英国英格兰倫敦維斯特明斯特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1670年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆波斯姆斯享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Richards
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Richard , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. Compare Rickards .
German: patronymic from the personal name   Richard  .

variants.name: Richard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Andre, Marcel, Pierre, Leonce, Normand, Camille, Lucien, Gilles, Henri.

English, French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, and Dutch: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The Middle English forms were Richard and Rikard, respectively Parisian Old French and Old Picard pronunciations of the ancient Germanic name. Middle English Rikard gives rise to the pet form Rick , whilst Richard has given the pet forms Richie and Rich . Both produced rhyming pet forms, Dick and Hick for Rikard and Hitch for Richard.

History: The LA Richard families are mainly descended from Acadian refugees in the second half of the 18th century. — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Massachusetts Colony Gains Control of New Hampshire
historicEvents.description: In 1641, Massachusetts gained control of New Hampshire until 1679 when New Hampshire became a separate royal colony.

historicEvents.title: First Recorded Slave in Portsmouth
historicEvents.description: In 1645, an African American man taken from Guinea was captured and brought to New Hampshire, he would be counted as the first African American slave in New Hampshire.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Black Heritage Trail in New Hampshire- Our African Heritage

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Ann Richards was born in 1623, in Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom, her father, Gilbert Richards, was 47 and her mother, Barbara Walter, was 25. She married Richard Carter on 4 August 1647, in Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1670, in Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Ann Richards est née en 1623, à Westminster, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gilbert Richards, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Barbara Walter, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Carter le 4 août 1647, à Westminster, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1670, à Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 47 ans.

ko.Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 포츠모우스
ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Ann Richards(이)가 1623년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilbert Richards(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Barbara Walter(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1647년 8월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터에서 Richard Carter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1670년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 포츠모우스에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Ann Richards родилась в 1623 г. в местности вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gilbert Richards было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Barbara Walter, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Carter 4 августа 1647 г. в местности вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1670 г. в местности порцмоут, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 47 лет.
